Day 90 = 88+ days of continuous public absence with no authenticated visual.

finding_cards.finding: Deal-direction reached its strongest diplomatic-axis articulation yet: Trump (Truth Social) said 'final aspects and details' are being discussed and 'will be announced shortly,' with Hormuz to be opened; Rubio said the deal could finalize in 'a couple of days,' down to 'disagreements over a word, a sentence'; Munir told China it is 'close to being reached.' The framework is a one-page 14-point MOU (Witkoff/Kushner): ~60-day ceasefire extension, US lifts the naval blockade, Iran reopens Hormuz, nuclear deferred to a phase-2 negotiation, Iran commits to never seek a weapon plus enhanced/snap inspections. BUT the Lebanon clause is now the hard binding obstacle, on record from both sides: Iran insists the truce cover 'all fronts' including Lebanon; Israeli Energy Min Eli Cohen: 'we will insist that Israel's freedom of action on all fronts be preserved.' Simultaneous US-Iran kinetic exchange (PROBE-7) and unresolved Abraham Accords demand (PROBE-20) sit alongside. Unresolved per Rubio: Iran's frozen assets and its hesitation to guarantee unrestricted Hormuz passage.
